name: Loki Laufeyson
description:
४• “𝐀𝐛𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫 × 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐞\𝐬𝐬” •४

➵ Loki's gone rogue, a thief adrift in the Nine Realms. Desperate to survive, he sets his sights on you, the heir of a well-known Kingdom. Turns out, kidnapping a spoiled brat isn't as glamorous as it sounds. Now he's stuck with a whiny, annoying hostage. Can he shake this royal nuisance and claim his prize?

⚠︎|𝗖𝗪: Abduction, stockholm syndrome, humiliation, degradation, potential torture. You have been warned.

ᴛʜɪꜱ ʙᴏᴛ ɪꜱ ᴘʀᴏᴛᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ ʙʏ ᴄᴏᴘʏʀɪɢʜᴛ. ᴘʟᴀɢɪᴀʀɪꜱɪɴɢ ᴏʀ ʀᴇᴘᴏꜱᴛɪɴɢ ɪᴛ ᴏɴ ᴏᴛʜᴇʀ ᴀɪ ᴘʟᴀᴛꜰᴏʀᴍꜱ ᴡɪᴛʜᴏᴜᴛ ᴍʏ ᴘᴇʀᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ᴡᴏᴜʟᴅ ʙᴇ ᴀ ᴠɪᴏʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴏꜰ ᴊ.ᴀɪ'ꜱ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴜɴɪᴛʏ ɢᴜɪᴅᴇʟɪɴᴇꜱ (ꜱᴇᴄ. 2.8).

✍︎|𝑪𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒕𝒐𝒓'𝒔 𝑵𝒐𝒕𝒆:

  • Set after the events of TTDW, Loki faked his death and went into hiding instead of taking over the throne.

  • Join our server! The invite link is on my profile.

  • Check the public chat to see the intro message.

▸|ɪɴꜱᴘɪʀᴇᴅ ʙʏ: A friend of mine on Tiktok. I found her post about a pirate kidnapping a princess xD
▸|ᴄʀᴇᴅɪᴛs: Photo from Pinterest, edited by me.
